zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen de Bohun於大約1089年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾艾奧時，她的父親Humphrey de Bohun52歲，母親Ealgyph de Bayeaux50歲。她於大約1119年與Anschetil de Grey在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1130年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾沃特 伊頓享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovak (Behúň) and Rusyn (from Slovakia; also Behún): nickname from Slovak behúň (Rusyn bihun) ‘fast runner’.
Irish: from Ó Beachain or Ó Beathain, see Behan . This form of the surname is almost extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Behan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Conan, Aileen.
Irish (southern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beachain ‘descendant of Beachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of beach ‘bee’.
Irish (southern): perhaps from Ó Beathain ‘descendant of Beathán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of beatha ‘life’. Compare Bean 5 and McBeth .

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen de Bohun was born about 1089, in Aynho, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Humphrey de Bohun, was 52 and her mother, Ealgyph de Bayeaux, was 50. She married Anschetil de Grey about 1119, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1130, in Water Eaton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

Elle a épousé Anschetil de Grey environ 1119, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1130, à Water Eaton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen de Bohunが約1089年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアエインホで生まれた時，父Humphrey de Bohunは52歳，母Ealgyph de Bayeauxは50歳であった。約1119年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでAnschetil de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1130年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアワター エアトンで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen de Bohun(이)가 대략 1089년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 아이호에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey de Bohun(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ealgyph de Bayeaux(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 대략 1119년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Anschetil de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 왓어 이턴에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.
